allow: Bash(claude:*)
Bash(python3 --version && pip3 --version && which python3 && which pip3)
Bash(chmod +x /home/runner/workspace/run.sh)
Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "pip install -r requirements.txt -q 2>&1 | tail -5" 2>/dev/null && echo "pip install done")
Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "pip install -r requirements.txt --break-system-packages -q 2>&1 | tail -5" 2>/dev/null && echo "pip install done")

Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "pip install -r /home/runner/workspace/requirements.txt --break-system-packages --user -q 2>&1 | tail -8" 2>/dev/null && echo "pip install done")

Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "
export PYTHONPATH=\\$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:\\$PYTHONPATH
SECRET_KEY=test-key-for-check DEBUG=True DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///test.db python3 manage.py check 2>&1
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "
export PYTHONPATH=\\$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:\\$PYTHONPATH
SECRET_KEY=test-key-for-check DEBUG=True DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///test.db python3 manage.py makemigrations 2>&1
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "
export PYTHONPATH=\\$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:\\$PYTHONPATH
SECRET_KEY=test-key-for-check DEBUG=True DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///test.db python3 manage.py makemigrations core catalog distribution events imports 2>&1
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "
export PYTHONPATH=\\$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:\\$PYTHONPATH
SECRET_KEY=test-key-for-check DEBUG=True DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///test.db python3 manage.py migrate 2>&1
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "
export PYTHONPATH=\\$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:\\$PYTHONPATH
SECRET_KEY=test-key-for-check DEBUG=True DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///test.db python3 manage.py seed_data 2>&1
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(nix-shell -p python313 python313Packages.pip --run "
export PYTHONPATH=\\$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:\\$PYTHONPATH
SECRET_KEY=test-key-for-check DEBUG=True DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///test.db python3 manage.py check --deploy 2>&1
" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(nix-shell -p python313 --run "python3 -c \\"from django.core.management.utils import get_random_secret_key; print\(get_random_secret_key\(\)\)\\"" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(git add PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md && git commit -m "Add PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md - living product documentation" && git push)
Bash(find /home/runner/workspace/apps -name "admin.py" -exec echo "=== {} ===" \\; -exec cat {} \\;)

Bash(tree -L 3 -I '__pycache__|*.pyc|node_modules|.git|staticfiles' /home/runner/workspace 2>/dev/null || find /home/runner/workspace -type f -name "*.py" -o -type d | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v .git | grep -v node_modules | sort | head -50)
Bash(python manage.py makemigrations core --name "add_phone_and_created_by_to_user" 2>&1)
Bash(export PYTHONPATH="$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:$PYTHONPATH" && python manage.py makemigrations core --name "add_phone_and_created_by_to_user" 2>&1)
Bash(export PYTHONPATH="$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:$PYTHONPATH" && python manage.py migrate 2>&1)
Bash(export PYTHONPATH="$HOME/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages:$PYTHONPATH" && python manage.py check 2>&1)
Bash(git add -A && git status)
